card.name: Umeda Sky Building (Floating Garden Observatory)  / At its basement, gourmands will be pleased to find a food court designed as a Japanese street from the early Showa period. It’s home to Okonomiyaki Kiji, purveyors of arguably the best okonomiyaki in all of Osaka.

Exit Tobu-Nikko Station and cross the road to the bus stands. Wait for the next bus at 2B. Take the bus to Stop 7, Shinkyo.
